links.source_location: Both describe nuxy-ext:// protocol for loading extension assets
Both are static analysis audit documents from 2026-05-19
Both are god-module anti-patterns in different files
Finding 5 vs Issue 8 — both identify untyped worker messages
Finding 6 vs Issue 1 — both identify (window as any).core in App.tsx
Worker lifecycle management relates to scanner lifecycle overload
Refactor plan recommends pre-transpiled .js; EXTENSION_GUIDE says .ts/.tsx
isolated-vm is a stronger sandbox evolving the zero-trust model
n8n needs secure secret storage — settings API is the solution
Both describe the same zero-trust / permissions-gate concept
Both define the CoreContext API contract
